valid.name: explicit-inner
never-bare-join
valid.code: SELECT a.id FROM a JOIN b ON a.id = b.id;

invalid.name: bare-join
invalid.code: SELECT u.id FROM users u JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id;

errors.message: Write `INNER JOIN` explicitly instead of bare `JOIN`.

invalid.output: SELECT u.id FROM users u INNER JOIN orders o ON o.user_id = u.id;

invalid.name: never-inner-join
invalid.code: SELECT a.id FROM a INNER JOIN b ON a.id = b.id;

errors.message: Omit the redundant `INNER`; use bare `JOIN` for inner joins.

invalid.output: SELECT a.id FROM a JOIN b ON a.id = b.id;
